standupEvents.title: BN PT / Physical Readiness
standupEvents.notes: Company commanders report PT accountability to S3 by 0815

standupEvents.title: BN Battle Update Brief (BUB)
standupEvents.participants: CDR, XO, SGM, S1–S8, Co CDRs
standupEvents.notes: Covers current ops status, personnel strength, training schedule

standupEvents.title: Targeting Coordination Meeting
standupEvents.participants: CDR, S2, S3, FSO, Fires Sgt
standupEvents.notes: CENTCOM targeting sync; ODA-level HVT tracking; JIPOE update

standupEvents.title: Intel Sync / Threat Brief
standupEvents.participants: S2 section, ODA Intel Sgts, S3
standupEvents.notes: Regional threat update; SIGINT/HUMINT summaries; RFI processing status

standupEvents.title: CDR Battle Rhythm / Weekly Sync
standupEvents.notes: Weekly objectives review; readiness posture; upcoming suspenses

standupEvents.title: XO Sync / Staff Huddle
standupEvents.notes: Staff coordination; suspense tracking; XO actions

standupEvents.title: Training Meeting
standupEvents.participants: CDR, XO, CSM, S3, S7, Co CDRs, 1SGs
standupEvents.notes: T-week through T+8 training forecast; DTMS input review; range scheduling; ACFT windows

standupEvents.title: Logistics Sync
standupEvents.participants: XO, S4, property book, Co XOs, Support Co CDR
standupEvents.notes: Supply status; OCIE accountability; maintenance float; Class IX ordering

standupEvents.title: Communications / IT Status Sync
standupEvents.participants: XO, S6 section, SIPR admin, Network NCO
standupEvents.notes: NIPR/SIPR health check; AUP compliance status; CAC/token renewals; open trouble tickets

standupEvents.title: SOCOM / Group HQ Weekly Sync (SVTC)
standupEvents.notes: Group Battle Rhythm downlink — Demo Battalion CDR monthly situational brief to Group

standupEvents.title: Personnel Readiness Update (S1)
standupEvents.notes: Strength report; in/out processing status; eval pipeline; flagging status

standupEvents.title: Finance / Pay Readiness Sync (S8)
standupEvents.notes: Pay discrepancies; FLPP audit; leave sell-back tracking; TDY vouchers

standupEvents.title: Civil Affairs / MISO Sync (S9/CA)
standupEvents.participants: S3, S9, attached CA teams, PSYOP liaison
standupEvents.notes: FHA/HCA project tracking; partner nation coordination; MISO product approval; CENTCOM CA annex

standupEvents.title: ODA Commander / Team Leader Sync
standupEvents.participants: Alpha/Bravo/Charlie Co CDRs, ODA CDRs, S3
standupEvents.notes: ODA readiness status; upcoming UTP events; deployment preparation updates

standupEvents.title: Key Leader Engagement Review (KLE)
standupEvents.participants: CDR, S2, S3, S9, ODA CDRs
standupEvents.notes: KLE planning and after-action review; partner nation relationship tracking

standupEvents.title: Medical Readiness Update
standupEvents.notes: MRC status report; PULHES update; deployment non-deployable tracking; dental class 3/4 list

standupEvents.title: Airborne / Jump Status Review
standupEvents.notes: Current jump log; currency tracking (90-day, 6-month); upcoming jump windows at Ft. Bragg DZST

standupEvents.title: GWOT / Theater Campaign Assessment
standupEvents.participants: CDR, S2, S3, ODA Intel Sgts
standupEvents.notes: CENTCOM-level theater strategic situation brief; JSOC OPORD synchronization

standupEvents.title: Language and Cultural Training (LCT) Block
standupEvents.notes: Arabic, Pashto, Dari, Hausa blocks; DLI ALTA prep; proficiency maintenance for FLPP recert

standupEvents.title: BN Weekly Closeout / CSM Notes
standupEvents.notes: Week closeout; safety brief; awards/promotions; upcoming schedule; PT plan for following week

standupEvents.title: OPSEC / AUP Compliance Review
standupEvents.notes: AUP completion dashboard; overdue personnel list forwarded to 1SGs; SIPR anomaly report

standupEvents.title: Readiness O&I (Operations and Intelligence)
standupEvents.participants: CDR, XO, S2, S3, Co CDRs
standupEvents.notes: Weekly O&I for full readiness picture; links to Group-level deployment forecast; ODA-specific items

standupEvents.title: Demo Battalion Group Battle Rhythm Sync (downlink)
standupEvents.notes: Group-level BN CDR call; UTP forecast; deployment sourcing; Group-directed suspenses

standupEvents.title: Safety Stand-Down / Risk Assessment Review
standupEvents.notes: Weekly risk register; OSHA/AR 385-10 compliance; after-action from any incidents previous week

standupEvents.title: ACFT / Physical Fitness Data Review
standupEvents.notes: DTMS ACFT score reconciliation; Required/Overdue athlete tracking; remedial PT assignment
